positive: A whimsical and elegant illustration of a nocturnal forest scene viewed through a stylized window. The composition should feature strong, silhouetted trees (like stylized birch and weeping willows) framing a central pathway of glowing, glowing fireflies and glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. Incorporate subtle geometric elements, such as interwoven vine patterns and celestial constellations visible in the dark sky background. The overall color palette should be deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and touches of luminous gold. Style: High contrast, clean line art combined with digitally rendered watercolor texture, optimized for apparel print. Focus on a central, symmetrical arrangement for maximum impact. Flat vector aesthetics mixed with depth. Studio lighting setup, clean edges, intricate detail, concept art.
negative: blurry, poor quality, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, grunge, grainy, jpeg artifacts, low detail, cartoonish, photorealism, overly complex, messy background,
